disclosures.name: Foundation 2021
disclosures.description: Sets out the purpose and system of the GRI Standards, key concepts, and requirements for reporting in accordance with the GRI Standards.
disclosures.guidanceText: Organizations must apply GRI 1 when using the GRI Standards. GRI 1 describes the reporting principles and requirements for reporting in accordance.

disclosures.name: Organizational details
disclosures.description: Report legal name, nature of ownership and legal form, location of headquarters, and countries of operation.

requiredMetrics.name: Legal name
requiredMetrics.description: Legal name of the organization

requiredMetrics.name: Nature of ownership
requiredMetrics.description: Nature of ownership and legal form

requiredMetrics.name: Location of headquarters
requiredMetrics.description: Location of the organization's headquarters

requiredMetrics.name: Countries of operation
requiredMetrics.description: Countries where the organization operates

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the legal name of the organization, its nature of ownership and legal form, the location of its headquarters, and the countries in which it operates.

crossReferences.notes: ESRS 2 BP-1 covers basis for preparation including organizational details
IFRS S1 para 42 requires entity identification

disclosures.name: Entities included in the organization's sustainability reporting
disclosures.description: List all entities included in sustainability reporting and explain differences from financial reporting entity.

requiredMetrics.name: Entities included
requiredMetrics.description: List of entities included in sustainability reporting

disclosures.guidanceText: List all its entities included in its sustainability reporting. Explain differences between the list of entities and financial reporting.

crossReferences.notes: IFRS S1 paras 20-24 address reporting entity

disclosures.name: Reporting period, frequency and contact point
disclosures.description: Specify the reporting period for and frequency of sustainability reporting, the reporting period for financial reporting, and the contact point.

requiredMetrics.name: Reporting period
requiredMetrics.description: Start and end date of reporting period

requiredMetrics.name: Reporting frequency
requiredMetrics.description: Annual, biannual, or other frequency

disclosures.guidanceText: Specify the reporting period for and the frequency of its sustainability reporting, the reporting period for its financial reporting, and the contact point for questions about the report.

disclosures.name: Restatements of information
disclosures.description: Report restatements of information given in previous reporting periods and explain reasons and effects.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report restatements of information made from previous reporting periods, and explain the reasons for the restatements and their effect.

disclosures.name: External assurance
disclosures.description: Describe the organization's policy and practice for seeking external assurance.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe its policy and practice for seeking external assurance, including whether and how the highest governance body and senior executives are involved.

disclosures.name: Activities, value chain and other business relationships
disclosures.description: Report activities, products, services, markets, supply chain, and entities in the value chain.

requiredMetrics.name: Sector
requiredMetrics.description: Sector(s) in which the organization is active

requiredMetrics.name: Value chain description
requiredMetrics.description: Description of the value chain

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the sectors in which it is active, describe its value chain including activities, products, services, and markets served.

disclosures.name: Employees
disclosures.description: Report total number of employees by gender and region, and permanent/temporary/full-time/part-time breakdown.

requiredMetrics.name: Total employees
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of employees

requiredMetrics.name: Employees by gender - male
requiredMetrics.description: Number of male employees

requiredMetrics.name: Employees by gender - female
requiredMetrics.description: Number of female employees

requiredMetrics.name: Permanent employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of permanent employees

requiredMetrics.name: Temporary employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of temporary employees

requiredMetrics.name: Full-time employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of full-time employees

requiredMetrics.name: Part-time employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of part-time employees

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of employees, and a breakdown of this total by gender and by region. Report total number of permanent, temporary, full-time, and part-time employees by gender.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S5: Total Employees

disclosures.name: Workers who are not employees
disclosures.description: Report total number of workers who are not employees and describe the type of work they perform.

requiredMetrics.name: Workers who are not employees
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of non-employee workers

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of workers who are not employees and whose work is controlled by the organization, and describe the type of work they perform.

disclosures.name: Governance structure and composition
disclosures.description: Describe governance structure including committees, their responsibilities, and composition by gender, independence, competencies.

requiredMetrics.name: Board members
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of board/governing body members

requiredMetrics.name: Independent board members
requiredMetrics.description: Number of independent members

requiredMetrics.name: Female board members
requiredMetrics.description: Number of female board members

disclosures.guidanceText: Describe its governance structure, including committees of the highest governance body that are responsible for decision-making on economic, environmental, and social topics.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI G1: Board Diversity

disclosures.name: Nomination and selection of the highest governance body
disclosures.description: Describe the nomination and selection processes for the highest governance body and its committees.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the nomination and selection processes for the highest governance body and its committees.

disclosures.name: Chair of the highest governance body
disclosures.description: Report whether the chair of the highest governance body is also a senior executive.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report whether the chair of the highest governance body is also a senior executive in the organization.

disclosures.name: Role of the highest governance body in overseeing the management of impacts
disclosures.description: Describe the role of the highest governance body in overseeing the organization's due diligence and other processes to identify and manage impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the role of the highest governance body and senior executives in developing, approving, and updating the organization's purpose, value or mission statements, strategies, policies, and goals related to sustainable development.

disclosures.name: Delegation of responsibility for managing impacts
disclosures.description: Describe how the highest governance body delegates responsibility for managing impacts and reports on sustainability to the board.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how the highest governance body delegates responsibility for managing the organization's impacts on the economy, environment, and people.

disclosures.name: Role of the highest governance body in sustainability reporting
disclosures.description: Report whether the highest governance body is responsible for reviewing and approving the reported information.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report whether the highest governance body is responsible for reviewing and approving the reported information, including the organization's material topics, and if so, describe the process for reviewing and approving the information.

disclosures.name: Conflicts of interest
disclosures.description: Describe processes for the highest governance body to ensure conflicts of interest are prevented and mitigated.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the processes for the highest governance body to ensure that conflicts of interest are prevented and mitigated.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI G5: Ethics & Anti-Corruption

disclosures.name: Communication of critical concerns
disclosures.description: Describe how critical concerns are communicated to the highest governance body.

requiredMetrics.name: Critical concerns communicated
requiredMetrics.description: Number of critical concerns communicated to the board

disclosures.guidanceText: Describe whether and how critical concerns are communicated to the highest governance body.

disclosures.name: Collective knowledge of the highest governance body
disclosures.description: Report measures taken to advance the collective knowledge, skills, and experience of the highest governance body on sustainable development.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report measures taken to advance the collective knowledge, skills, and experience of the highest governance body on sustainable development.

disclosures.name: Evaluation of the performance of the highest governance body
disclosures.description: Describe processes for evaluating the performance of the highest governance body in overseeing management of impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the processes for evaluating the performance of the highest governance body in overseeing the management of the organization's impacts.

disclosures.name: Remuneration policies
disclosures.description: Describe remuneration policies for members of the highest governance body and senior executives.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the remuneration policies for members of the highest governance body and senior executives.

disclosures.name: Process to determine remuneration
disclosures.description: Describe the process for designing remuneration policies and for determining remuneration.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the process for designing its remuneration policies and for determining remuneration.

disclosures.name: Annual total compensation ratio
disclosures.description: Report the ratio of the annual total compensation for the highest-paid individual to the median annual total compensation for all employees.

requiredMetrics.name: CEO-to-median compensation ratio
requiredMetrics.description: Ratio of highest-paid individual's compensation to median employee compensation

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the ratio of the annual total compensation for the organization's highest-paid individual to the median annual total compensation for all employees.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI G3: CEO Pay Ratio

disclosures.name: Statement on sustainable development strategy
disclosures.description: Report a statement from the highest governance body or most senior executive about the relevance of sustainable development and the strategy for contributing to it.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report a statement from the highest governance body or most senior executive of the organization about the relevance of sustainable development to the organization and its strategy for contributing to sustainable development.

disclosures.name: Policy commitments
disclosures.description: Describe policy commitments for responsible business conduct including human rights.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe its policy commitments for responsible business conduct, including the authoritative instruments that the commitments reference.

disclosures.name: Embedding policy commitments
disclosures.description: Describe how it embeds each of its policy commitments for responsible business conduct throughout its activities and business relationships.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how it embeds each of its policy commitments for responsible business conduct throughout its activities and business relationships.

disclosures.name: Processes to remediate negative impacts
disclosures.description: Describe commitments and approach to remediate negative impacts caused or contributed to.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe its commitments to provide for or cooperate in the remediation of negative impacts that the organization identifies it has caused or contributed to.

disclosures.name: Mechanisms for seeking advice and raising concerns
disclosures.description: Describe mechanisms for individuals to seek advice on implementing policies and raise concerns about business conduct.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the mechanisms for individuals to seek advice on implementing the organization's policies and practices for responsible business conduct, and to raise concerns about the organization's business conduct.

disclosures.name: Compliance with laws and regulations
disclosures.description: Report instances of non-compliance with laws and regulations and fines paid.

requiredMetrics.name: Instances of non-compliance
requiredMetrics.description: Total instances of non-compliance with laws and regulations

requiredMetrics.name: Fines paid
requiredMetrics.description: Total monetary value of significant fines

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of significant instances of non-compliance with laws and regulations during the reporting period, and the total number and monetary value of fines.

disclosures.name: Membership associations
disclosures.description: Report industry associations, other membership associations, and national or international advocacy organizations in which it participates.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report industry associations, other membership associations, and national or international advocacy organizations in which it participates in a significant role.

disclosures.name: Approach to stakeholder engagement
disclosures.description: Describe approach to engaging with stakeholders including categories and purpose.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe its approach to engaging with stakeholders, including the categories of stakeholders it engages with, and how it identifies them.

disclosures.name: Collective bargaining agreements
disclosures.description: Report percentage of total employees covered by collective bargaining agreements.

requiredMetrics.name: Employees covered by collective bargaining
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of total employees covered by collective bargaining agreements

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of total employees covered by collective bargaining agreements.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S8: Collective Bargaining

disclosures.name: Process to determine material topics
disclosures.description: Describe the process to determine material topics including stakeholder engagement and impacts identification.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the process it has followed to determine its material topics, including how it has identified actual and potential impacts on the economy, environment, and people.

crossReferences.notes: ESRS double materiality assessment
ISSB focuses on financial materiality only

disclosures.name: List of material topics
disclosures.description: List the organization's material topics and report changes compared with previous reporting period.

requiredMetrics.name: Material topics
requiredMetrics.description: List of identified material topics

disclosures.guidanceText: List its material topics. Report changes to the list of material topics compared with the previous reporting period.

disclosures.name: Management of material topics
disclosures.description: For each material topic, describe actual and potential impacts, policies and commitments, actions taken, and effectiveness tracking.
disclosures.guidanceText: For each material topic reported under Disclosure 3-2, the organization shall describe actual and potential, negative and positive impacts on the economy, environment, and people.

disclosures.name: Direct economic value generated and distributed
disclosures.description: Report direct economic value generated and distributed including revenues, operating costs, employee wages, payments to providers of capital, payments to government, and community investments.

requiredMetrics.name: Revenue
requiredMetrics.description: Direct economic value generated - revenues

requiredMetrics.name: Operating costs
requiredMetrics.description: Economic value distributed - operating costs

requiredMetrics.name: Employee wages and benefits
requiredMetrics.description: Economic value distributed - wages and benefits

requiredMetrics.name: Payments to providers of capital
requiredMetrics.description: Economic value distributed - dividends and interest

requiredMetrics.name: Payments to government
requiredMetrics.description: Economic value distributed - taxes

requiredMetrics.name: Community investments
requiredMetrics.description: Economic value distributed - community investments

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the direct economic value generated and distributed (EVG&D) on an accruals basis.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI G4: Tax Transparency

disclosures.name: Financial implications and other risks and opportunities due to climate change
disclosures.description: Report risks and opportunities posed by climate change that have the potential to generate substantive changes in operations, revenue, or expenditure.

requiredMetrics.name: Financial implications of climate risks
requiredMetrics.description: Estimated financial impact of climate risks

disclosures.guidanceText: Report risks and opportunities posed by climate change that have the potential to generate substantive changes in operations, revenue, or expenditure.

disclosures.name: Defined benefit plan obligations and other retirement plans
disclosures.description: Report coverage of defined benefit plan obligations and retirement plans.

requiredMetrics.name: Pension plan coverage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees covered by retirement plans

disclosures.guidanceText: Report whether the plan's liabilities are met by the organization's general resources or through a separate fund.

disclosures.name: Financial assistance received from government
disclosures.description: Report total monetary value of financial assistance received by the organization from any government.

requiredMetrics.name: Government financial assistance
requiredMetrics.description: Total monetary value of financial assistance from government

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total monetary value of financial assistance received by the organization from any government during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Ratios of standard entry level wage by gender compared to local minimum wage
disclosures.description: Report ratio of standard entry level wage to local minimum wage at significant locations of operation.

requiredMetrics.name: Entry level wage to minimum wage ratio
requiredMetrics.description: Ratio of entry level wage to local minimum wage

disclosures.guidanceText: When a significant proportion of employees are compensated based on wages subject to minimum wage rules, report the relevant ratio of the entry level wage by gender at significant locations of operation to the minimum wage.

disclosures.name: Proportion of senior management hired from the local community
disclosures.description: Report percentage of senior management at significant locations of operation that are hired from the local community.

requiredMetrics.name: Senior management from local community
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of senior management hired locally

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of senior management at significant locations of operation that are hired from the local community.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S6: Nationalization/Saudization

disclosures.name: Infrastructure investments and services supported
disclosures.description: Report extent of development of significant infrastructure investments and services supported.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the extent of development of significant infrastructure investments and services supported. Report the current or expected impacts on communities and local economies.

disclosures.name: Significant indirect economic impacts
disclosures.description: Report significant indirect economic impacts identified, including positive and negative impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report examples of significant identified indirect economic impacts of the organization, including positive and negative impacts.

disclosures.name: Proportion of spending on local suppliers
disclosures.description: Report percentage of procurement budget spent on local suppliers at significant locations of operation.

requiredMetrics.name: Local procurement spending
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of procurement budget used for local suppliers

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of the procurement budget used for significant locations of operation that is spent on suppliers local to that operation.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S10: Local Procurement

disclosures.name: Operations assessed for risks related to corruption
disclosures.description: Report total number and percentage of operations assessed for risks related to corruption and significant risks identified.

requiredMetrics.name: Operations assessed for corruption risk
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of operations assessed for corruption risks

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number and percentage of operations assessed for risks related to corruption.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI G5: Ethics & Anti-Corruption

disclosures.name: Communication and training about anti-corruption policies and procedures
disclosures.description: Report total number and percentage of governance body members and employees that anti-corruption policies and procedures have been communicated to.

requiredMetrics.name: Anti-corruption training coverage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees trained on anti-corruption

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number and percentage of governance body members that the organization's anti-corruption policies and procedures have been communicated to, broken down by region.

disclosures.name: Confirmed incidents of corruption and actions taken
disclosures.description: Report total number and nature of confirmed incidents of corruption.

requiredMetrics.name: Confirmed corruption incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of confirmed incidents of corruption

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number and nature of confirmed incidents of corruption. Report the total number of confirmed incidents in which employees were dismissed or disciplined for corruption.

disclosures.name: Legal actions for anti-competitive behavior, anti-trust, and monopoly practices
disclosures.description: Report number of legal actions pending or completed regarding anti-competitive behavior.

requiredMetrics.name: Anti-competitive legal actions
requiredMetrics.description: Number of legal actions for anti-competitive behavior

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the number of legal actions pending or completed during the reporting period regarding anti-competitive behavior and violations of anti-trust and monopoly legislation.

disclosures.name: Approach to tax
disclosures.description: Describe the approach to tax including governance, compliance strategy, and linking to business and sustainability strategies.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the approach to tax, including whether the organization has a tax strategy, the governance body or executive oversight, approach to regulatory compliance, and how approach to tax is linked to business and sustainable development strategies.

disclosures.name: Tax governance, control, and risk management
disclosures.description: Describe tax governance and control framework and mechanisms for reporting concerns about tax.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the tax governance and control framework.

disclosures.name: Stakeholder engagement and management of concerns related to tax
disclosures.description: Describe the approach to stakeholder engagement and management of stakeholder concerns related to tax.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the approach to stakeholder engagement and management of stakeholder concerns related to tax.

disclosures.name: Country-by-country reporting
disclosures.description: Report tax jurisdiction-level data on revenues, profit before tax, income tax paid, and stated capital.

requiredMetrics.name: Revenue by tax jurisdiction
requiredMetrics.description: Revenue per tax jurisdiction

requiredMetrics.name: Profit/loss before tax
requiredMetrics.description: Profit before tax per jurisdiction

requiredMetrics.name: Income tax paid
requiredMetrics.description: Corporate income tax paid per jurisdiction

disclosures.guidanceText: For each tax jurisdiction report names of resident entities, primary activities, number of employees, revenues, profit/loss before tax, tangible assets other than cash.

disclosures.name: Materials used by weight or volume
disclosures.description: Report the total weight or volume of materials used to produce and package primary products and services.

requiredMetrics.name: Non-renewable materials used
requiredMetrics.description: Total weight of non-renewable materials used

requiredMetrics.name: Renewable materials used
requiredMetrics.description: Total weight of renewable materials used

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total weight or volume of materials that are used to produce and package the organization's primary products and services during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Recycled input materials used
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of recycled input materials used to manufacture the organization's primary products and services.

requiredMetrics.name: Recycled input materials
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of recycled input materials

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of recycled input materials used to manufacture the organization's primary products and services.

disclosures.name: Reclaimed products and their packaging materials
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of reclaimed products and their packaging materials for each product category.

requiredMetrics.name: Reclaimed products
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of reclaimed products and packaging

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of reclaimed products and their packaging materials for each product category.

disclosures.name: Energy consumption within the organization
disclosures.description: Report total energy consumption from renewable and non-renewable sources within the organization in joules or multiples.

requiredMetrics.name: Total fuel consumption from non-renewable sources
requiredMetrics.description: Fuel consumption from non-renewable sources in GJ

requiredMetrics.name: Total fuel consumption from renewable sources
requiredMetrics.description: Fuel consumption from renewable sources in GJ

requiredMetrics.name: Electricity consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total electricity consumed

requiredMetrics.name: Heating consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total heating energy consumed

requiredMetrics.name: Cooling consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total cooling energy consumed

requiredMetrics.name: Steam consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total steam energy consumed

requiredMetrics.name: Total energy consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total energy consumption within the organization

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total fuel consumption within the organization from non-renewable sources in joules or multiples, including fuel types used. Report total fuel consumption within the organization from renewable sources.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI E1: GHG Emissions

disclosures.name: Energy consumption outside of the organization
disclosures.description: Report energy consumption outside of the organization in joules or multiples.

requiredMetrics.name: Energy consumption outside organization
requiredMetrics.description: Total energy consumption outside the organization

disclosures.guidanceText: Report energy consumption outside of the organization, in joules or multiples.

disclosures.name: Energy intensity
disclosures.description: Report energy intensity ratio for the organization.

requiredMetrics.name: Energy intensity ratio
requiredMetrics.description: Energy intensity per unit of activity or output

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the energy intensity ratio for the organization. Report the organization-specific metric chosen to calculate the ratio.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI E3: Energy Usage

disclosures.name: Reduction of energy consumption
disclosures.description: Report amount of reductions in energy consumption achieved as a direct result of conservation and efficiency initiatives.

requiredMetrics.name: Energy reduction
requiredMetrics.description: Amount of energy reduction achieved

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the amount of reductions in energy consumption achieved as a direct result of conservation and efficiency initiatives, in joules or multiples.

disclosures.name: Reductions in energy requirements of products and services
disclosures.description: Report reductions in energy requirements of products and services sold during the reporting period.

requiredMetrics.name: Product energy reduction
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage reduction in energy requirements of products and services

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the reductions in energy requirements of sold products and services achieved during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Interactions with water as a shared resource
disclosures.description: Describe how the organization interacts with water, including how and where water is withdrawn, consumed, and discharged, and the water-related impacts caused or contributed to.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe how the organization interacts with water, including how and where water is withdrawn, consumed, and discharged.

disclosures.name: Management of water discharge-related impacts
disclosures.description: Describe approach to managing water discharge-related impacts and minimum standards set for quality of effluent discharged.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report a description of any minimum standards set for the quality of effluent discharge, and how these minimum standards were determined.

disclosures.name: Water withdrawal
disclosures.description: Report total water withdrawal from all areas and from areas with water stress, by source.

requiredMetrics.name: Total water withdrawal
requiredMetrics.description: Total water withdrawal in megaliters

requiredMetrics.name: Water withdrawal from water-stressed areas
requiredMetrics.description: Water withdrawal from water-stressed areas

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total water withdrawal from all areas in megaliters, and a breakdown of this total by source.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI E4: Water Usage

disclosures.name: Water discharge
disclosures.description: Report total water discharge to all areas and to areas with water stress, by destination and treatment level.

requiredMetrics.name: Total water discharge
requiredMetrics.description: Total water discharge in megaliters

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total water discharge to all areas in megaliters, and a breakdown of this total by destination and treatment level.

disclosures.name: Water consumption
disclosures.description: Report total water consumption from all areas and from areas with water stress.

requiredMetrics.name: Total water consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total water consumption in megaliters

requiredMetrics.name: Water consumption in water-stressed areas
requiredMetrics.description: Water consumption from water-stressed areas

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total water consumption from all areas in megaliters. Report total water consumption from all areas with water stress in megaliters.

disclosures.name: Operational sites owned, leased, managed in, or adjacent to, protected areas and areas of high biodiversity value outside protected areas
disclosures.description: Report information on operational sites owned, leased, managed in, or adjacent to protected areas and areas of high biodiversity value.
disclosures.guidanceText: For each operational site owned, leased, managed in, or adjacent to, protected areas and areas of high biodiversity value outside protected areas, report the geographic location, subsurface and underground land, position in relation to the protected area.

disclosures.name: Significant impacts of activities, products and services on biodiversity
disclosures.description: Report the nature of significant direct and indirect impacts on biodiversity.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the nature of significant direct and indirect impacts on biodiversity with reference to species affected, extent of areas impacted, duration of impacts, and reversibility.

disclosures.name: Habitats protected or restored
disclosures.description: Report size and location of all habitat areas protected or restored and whether restoration success was approved by independent external professionals.

requiredMetrics.name: Habitat areas protected or restored
requiredMetrics.description: Size of habitat areas protected or restored

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the size and location of all habitat areas protected or restored, and whether the success of the restoration measure was or is approved by independent external professionals.

disclosures.name: IUCN Red List species and national conservation list species with habitats in areas affected by operations
disclosures.description: Report total number of IUCN Red List species and national conservation list species with habitats in areas affected by the organization's operations.

requiredMetrics.name: IUCN Red List species affected
requiredMetrics.description: Number of IUCN Red List species with habitats in affected areas

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of IUCN Red List species and national conservation list species with habitats in areas affected by the operations of the organization.

disclosures.name: Direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Report gross direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent, gases included, biogenic CO2 emissions, base year, source of emission factors, and consolidation approach.

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 1 GHG emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Gross direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions

requiredMetrics.name: Biogenic CO2 emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Biogenic CO2 emissions in metric tons

disclosures.guidanceText: Report gross direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent. Report gases included in the calculation (CO2, CH4, N2O, HFCs, PFCs, SF6, NF3). Report biogenic CO2 emissions separately.

crossReferences.notes: ESRS E1-6 requires Scope 1 GHG emissions
IFRS S2 para 29(a) requires absolute Scope 1 GHG emissions
Saudi Exchange KPI E1: GHG Emissions (Scope 1)
ADX ESG metric E1: GHG Emissions

disclosures.name: Energy indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Report gross location-based and market-based energy indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent.

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 2 GHG emissions (location-based)
requiredMetrics.description: Gross location-based Scope 2 GHG emissions

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 2 GHG emissions (market-based)
requiredMetrics.description: Gross market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions

disclosures.guidanceText: Report gross location-based energy indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent. If applicable, report gross market-based energy indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI E1: GHG Emissions (Scope 2)

disclosures.name: Other indirect (Scope 3) GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Report gross other indirect (Scope 3) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent.

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 3 GHG emissions
requiredMetrics.calculationMethod: GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard
requiredMetrics.description: Gross other indirect (Scope 3) GHG emissions by category

disclosures.guidanceText: Report gross other indirect (Scope 3) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent. Report the categories included.

disclosures.name: GHG emissions intensity
disclosures.description: Report the GHG emissions intensity ratio for the organization.

requiredMetrics.name: GHG emissions intensity
requiredMetrics.description: GHG emissions intensity per organization-specific denominator

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the GHG emissions intensity ratio for the organization. Report the organization-specific metric chosen to calculate the ratio.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI E2: Emissions Intensity

disclosures.name: Reduction of GHG emissions
disclosures.description: Report GHG emissions reductions achieved as a direct result of initiatives to reduce emissions.

requiredMetrics.name: GHG emissions reductions
requiredMetrics.description: Total GHG emissions reductions achieved

disclosures.guidanceText: Report GHG emissions reduced as a direct result of reduction initiatives, in metric tons of CO2 equivalent.

disclosures.name: Emissions of ozone-depleting substances (ODS)
disclosures.description: Report production, imports, and exports of ODS in metric tons of CFC-11 equivalent.

requiredMetrics.name: ODS emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Ozone-depleting substances in CFC-11 equivalent

disclosures.guidanceText: Report production, imports, and exports of ODS in metric tons of CFC-11 (trichlorofluoromethane) equivalent.

disclosures.name: Nitrogen oxides (NOx), sulfur oxides (SOx), and other significant air emissions
disclosures.description: Report significant air emissions, including NOx, SOx, persistent organic pollutants, volatile organic compounds, hazardous air pollutants, and particulate matter.

requiredMetrics.name: NOx emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Nitrogen oxides emissions

requiredMetrics.name: SOx emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Sulfur oxides emissions

requiredMetrics.name: VOC emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Volatile organic compounds emissions

requiredMetrics.name: Particulate matter emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Particulate matter (PM) emissions

disclosures.guidanceText: Report significant air emissions, in kilograms or multiples, for NOx, SOx, persistent organic pollutants (POP), volatile organic compounds (VOC), hazardous air pollutants (HAP), particulate matter (PM).

disclosures.name: Waste generation and significant waste-related impacts
disclosures.description: Describe the inputs, activities, and outputs that lead to the organization's significant waste-related impacts.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report a description of the inputs, activities, and outputs that lead or could lead to the organization's significant waste-related impacts.

disclosures.name: Management of significant waste-related impacts
disclosures.description: Describe actions taken to prevent waste generation and manage significant impacts from waste generated.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report a description of the actions, including circularity measures, taken to prevent waste generation in the organization's own activities and upstream and downstream in its value chain.

disclosures.name: Waste generated
disclosures.description: Report total weight of waste generated and a breakdown by composition.

requiredMetrics.name: Total waste generated
requiredMetrics.description: Total weight of waste generated

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total weight of waste generated in metric tons, and a breakdown of this total by composition of the waste.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI E5: Waste Generated

disclosures.name: Waste diverted from disposal
disclosures.description: Report total weight of waste diverted from disposal and a breakdown by composition, recovery operation, and on-site/off-site.

requiredMetrics.name: Waste diverted from disposal
requiredMetrics.description: Total weight of waste diverted from disposal

requiredMetrics.name: Hazardous waste diverted
requiredMetrics.description: Hazardous waste diverted from disposal

requiredMetrics.name: Non-hazardous waste diverted
requiredMetrics.description: Non-hazardous waste diverted from disposal

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total weight of waste diverted from disposal in metric tons, and a breakdown of this total by composition of the waste.

disclosures.name: Waste directed to disposal
disclosures.description: Report total weight of waste directed to disposal and a breakdown by composition, disposal operation, and on-site/off-site.

requiredMetrics.name: Waste directed to disposal
requiredMetrics.description: Total weight of waste directed to disposal

requiredMetrics.name: Hazardous waste to disposal
requiredMetrics.description: Hazardous waste directed to disposal

requiredMetrics.name: Non-hazardous waste to disposal
requiredMetrics.description: Non-hazardous waste directed to disposal

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total weight of waste directed to disposal in metric tons, and a breakdown of this total by composition of the waste.

disclosures.name: New employee hires and employee turnover
disclosures.description: Report total number and rate of new employee hires and employee turnover by age group, gender, and region.

requiredMetrics.name: New employee hires
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of new employee hires

requiredMetrics.name: New hire rate
requiredMetrics.description: Rate of new employee hires

requiredMetrics.name: Employee turnover
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of employee turnover

requiredMetrics.name: Turnover rate
requiredMetrics.description: Rate of employee turnover

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number and rate of new employee hires during the reporting period, by age group, gender, and region. Report the total number and rate of employee turnover during the reporting period, by age group, gender, and region.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S7: Employee Turnover

disclosures.name: Benefits provided to full-time employees that are not provided to temporary or part-time employees
disclosures.description: Report benefits provided to full-time employees that are not provided to temporary or part-time employees.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the benefits which are standard for full-time employees of the organization but are not provided to temporary or part-time employees.

disclosures.name: Parental leave
disclosures.description: Report total number of employees entitled to parental leave, by gender; number who took parental leave; number who returned to work; retention rates.

requiredMetrics.name: Employees entitled to parental leave
requiredMetrics.description: Number of employees entitled to parental leave

requiredMetrics.name: Employees who took parental leave
requiredMetrics.description: Number who took parental leave

requiredMetrics.name: Return to work rate after parental leave
requiredMetrics.description: Return to work rate

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of employees that were entitled to parental leave, by gender. Report the total number of employees that took parental leave, by gender.

disclosures.name: Minimum notice periods regarding operational changes
disclosures.description: Report the minimum number of weeks' notice typically provided to employees and their representatives prior to implementing significant operational changes.

requiredMetrics.name: Minimum notice period
requiredMetrics.description: Minimum notice period for operational changes

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the minimum number of weeks' notice typically provided to employees and their representatives prior to the implementation of significant operational changes.

disclosures.name: Occupational health and safety management system
disclosures.description: Report whether an occupational health and safety management system has been implemented.
disclosures.guidanceText: State whether an occupational health and safety management system has been implemented, including whether it has been implemented because of legal requirements or recognized risk-management standards/guidelines.

disclosures.name: Hazard identification, risk assessment, and incident investigation
disclosures.description: Describe the processes used to identify work-related hazards, assess risks, and investigate incidents.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the processes used to identify work-related hazards and assess risks on a routine and non-routine basis, and to apply the hierarchy of controls.

disclosures.name: Occupational health services
disclosures.description: Describe the occupational health services' functions that contribute to the identification and elimination of hazards.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the occupational health services' functions that contribute to the identification and elimination of hazards and minimization of risks.

disclosures.name: Worker participation, consultation, and communication on occupational health and safety
disclosures.description: Describe the processes for worker participation and consultation in the development, implementation, and evaluation of the OHS management system.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the processes for worker participation and consultation in the development, implementation, and evaluation of the occupational health and safety management system.

disclosures.name: Worker training on occupational health and safety
disclosures.description: Describe the occupational health and safety training provided to workers.

requiredMetrics.name: OHS training hours
requiredMetrics.description: Total occupational health and safety training hours

disclosures.guidanceText: Describe any occupational health and safety training provided to workers, including generic training as well as training on specific work-related hazards.

disclosures.name: Promotion of worker health
disclosures.description: Describe approach to facilitating workers' access to non-occupational medical and healthcare services.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report an explanation of how the organization facilitates workers' access to non-occupational medical and healthcare services, and the scope of access provided.

disclosures.name: Prevention and mitigation of occupational health and safety impacts directly linked by business relationships
disclosures.description: Describe the organization's approach to preventing or mitigating significant negative OHS impacts directly linked to its operations through business relationships.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the organization's approach to preventing or mitigating significant negative occupational health and safety impacts that are directly linked to its operations, products, or services by its business relationships.

disclosures.name: Workers covered by an occupational health and safety management system
disclosures.description: Report number and percentage of employees and non-employee workers covered by an OHS management system that has been internally audited or certified.

requiredMetrics.name: Workers covered by OHS system
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of workers covered by OHS management system

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the number and percentage of all employees and workers who are not employees but whose work and/or workplace is controlled by the organization, who are covered by such a system.

disclosures.name: Work-related injuries
disclosures.description: Report the number and rate of fatalities, high-consequence work-related injuries, and recordable work-related injuries for all employees and non-employee workers.

requiredMetrics.name: Fatalities from work-related injuries
requiredMetrics.description: Number of fatalities as a result of work-related injury

requiredMetrics.name: High-consequence work-related injuries
requiredMetrics.description: Number of high-consequence work-related injuries (excluding fatalities)

requiredMetrics.name: Recordable work-related injuries
requiredMetrics.description: Number of recordable work-related injuries

requiredMetrics.name: Hours worked
requiredMetrics.description: Number of hours worked

requiredMetrics.name: Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate (LTIFR)
requiredMetrics.description: Rate of lost-time injuries per million hours worked

requiredMetrics.name: Total Recordable Incident Rate (TRIR)
requiredMetrics.description: Rate of total recordable incidents per 200,000 hours worked

disclosures.guidanceText: For all employees, report the number and rate of fatalities as a result of work-related injury; high-consequence work-related injuries (excluding fatalities); recordable work-related injuries; main types of work-related injury; number of hours worked.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S1: Employee Health & Safety

disclosures.name: Work-related ill health
disclosures.description: Report the number and types of cases of work-related ill health for all employees and non-employee workers.

requiredMetrics.name: Fatalities from work-related ill health
requiredMetrics.description: Number of fatalities from work-related ill health

requiredMetrics.name: Cases of recordable work-related ill health
requiredMetrics.description: Number of cases of recordable work-related ill health

disclosures.guidanceText: For all employees, report the number of fatalities as a result of work-related ill health; the number of cases of recordable work-related ill health; the main types of work-related ill health.

disclosures.name: Average hours of training per year per employee
disclosures.description: Report the average hours of training that employees have undertaken during the reporting period, by gender and employee category.

requiredMetrics.name: Average training hours per employee
requiredMetrics.description: Average hours of training per employee per year

requiredMetrics.name: Average training hours - male
requiredMetrics.description: Average training hours for male employees

requiredMetrics.name: Average training hours - female
requiredMetrics.description: Average training hours for female employees

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the average hours of training that the organization's employees have undertaken during the reporting period, by gender, and by employee category.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S3: Employee Training

disclosures.name: Programs for upgrading employee skills and transition assistance programs
disclosures.description: Report the type and scope of programs implemented and assistance provided to upgrade employee skills and transition assistance.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report the type and scope of programs implemented and assistance provided to upgrade employee skills.

disclosures.name: Percentage of employees receiving regular performance and career development reviews
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of total employees by gender and employee category who received a regular performance and career development review.

requiredMetrics.name: Employees receiving performance reviews
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees receiving regular performance reviews

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of total employees by gender and by employee category who received a regular performance and career development review during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Diversity of governance bodies and employees
disclosures.description: Report percentage of individuals within governance bodies and employee categories by gender, age group, and other indicators of diversity.

requiredMetrics.name: Board diversity - female
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of female members on governance body

requiredMetrics.name: Employee diversity by gender
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of female employees

requiredMetrics.name: Employee diversity by age - under 30
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees under 30

requiredMetrics.name: Employee diversity by age - 30-50
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees aged 30-50

requiredMetrics.name: Employee diversity by age - over 50
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees over 50

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of individuals within the organization's governance bodies in each of the following diversity categories: gender, age group, other indicators of diversity where relevant.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI G1: Board Diversity
Saudi Exchange KPI S4: Gender Diversity

disclosures.name: Ratio of basic salary and remuneration of women to men
disclosures.description: Report the ratio of basic salary and remuneration of women to men for each employee category, by significant locations of operation.

requiredMetrics.name: Gender pay ratio
requiredMetrics.description: Ratio of female to male basic salary by employee category

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the ratio of the basic salary and remuneration of women to men for each employee category, by significant locations of operation.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S9: Gender Pay Gap

disclosures.name: Incidents of discrimination and corrective actions taken
disclosures.description: Report the total number of incidents of discrimination during the reporting period and corrective actions taken.

requiredMetrics.name: Discrimination incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Number of incidents of discrimination

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of incidents of discrimination during the reporting period. Report the status of the incidents and actions taken.

disclosures.name: Operations and suppliers in which the right to freedom of association and collective bargaining may be at risk
disclosures.description: Report operations and suppliers where the right to exercise freedom of association and collective bargaining may be violated or at significant risk.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report operations and suppliers in which workers' rights to exercise freedom of association or collective bargaining may be violated or at significant risk.

disclosures.name: Operations and suppliers at significant risk for incidents of child labor
disclosures.description: Report operations and suppliers considered to have significant risk for incidents of child labor.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report operations and suppliers considered to have significant risk for incidents of child labor, in terms of type of operation and supplier, and countries or areas with operations and suppliers considered at risk.

disclosures.name: Operations and suppliers at significant risk for incidents of forced or compulsory labor
disclosures.description: Report operations and suppliers considered to have significant risk for incidents of forced or compulsory labor.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report operations and suppliers considered to have significant risk for incidents of forced or compulsory labor.

disclosures.name: Security personnel trained in human rights policies or procedures
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of security personnel who have received formal training in the organization's human rights policies.

requiredMetrics.name: Security personnel trained in human rights
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of security personnel trained

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of security personnel who have received formal training in the organization's human rights policies or specific procedures and their application to security.

disclosures.name: Incidents of violations involving rights of indigenous peoples
disclosures.description: Report the total number of identified incidents of violations involving the rights of indigenous peoples during the reporting period.

requiredMetrics.name: Indigenous rights violations
requiredMetrics.description: Number of incidents involving rights of indigenous peoples

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of identified incidents of violations involving the rights of indigenous peoples during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Operations with local community engagement, impact assessments, and development programs
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of operations with implemented local community engagement, impact assessments, and/or development programs.

requiredMetrics.name: Operations with community engagement
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of operations with local community engagement programs

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of operations with implemented local community engagement, impact assessments, and/or development programs.

disclosures.name: Operations with significant actual and potential negative impacts on local communities
disclosures.description: Report operations with significant actual and potential negative impacts on local communities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report operations with significant actual and potential negative impacts on local communities, including the location of the operations and the significant actual and potential negative impacts.

disclosures.name: New suppliers that were screened using social criteria
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of new suppliers that were screened using social criteria.

requiredMetrics.name: New suppliers screened on social criteria
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of new suppliers screened using social criteria

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of new suppliers that were screened using social criteria.

disclosures.name: Negative social impacts in the supply chain and actions taken
disclosures.description: Report the number of suppliers assessed for social impacts, number identified as having significant actual and potential negative social impacts, and actions taken.

requiredMetrics.name: Suppliers assessed for social impacts
requiredMetrics.description: Number of suppliers assessed for social impacts

requiredMetrics.name: Suppliers with negative social impacts
requiredMetrics.description: Number of suppliers with significant negative social impacts

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the number of suppliers assessed for social impacts. Report the number of suppliers identified as having significant actual and potential negative social impacts.

disclosures.name: Political contributions
disclosures.description: Report the total monetary value of financial and in-kind political contributions made directly and indirectly by the organization by country and recipient/beneficiary.

requiredMetrics.name: Political contributions
requiredMetrics.description: Total monetary value of political contributions

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total monetary value of financial and in-kind political contributions made directly and indirectly by the organization by country and recipient/beneficiary.

disclosures.name: Assessment of the health and safety impacts of product and service categories
disclosures.description: Report the percentage of significant product and service categories for which health and safety impacts are assessed for improvement.

requiredMetrics.name: Products assessed for health/safety impacts
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of products assessed for health and safety impacts

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of significant product and service categories for which health and safety impacts are assessed for improvement.

disclosures.name: Incidents of non-compliance concerning the health and safety impacts of products and services
disclosures.description: Report the total number of incidents of non-compliance with regulations and/or voluntary codes concerning the health and safety impacts of products and services.

requiredMetrics.name: Health/safety non-compliance incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Number of non-compliance incidents for product health and safety

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of incidents of non-compliance with regulations and/or voluntary codes concerning the health and safety impacts of products and services.

disclosures.name: Requirements for product and service information and labeling
disclosures.description: Report whether product and service information and labeling procedures require specific information types.
disclosures.guidanceText: Report whether each of the following types of information is required by the organization's procedures for product and service information and labeling.

disclosures.name: Incidents of non-compliance concerning product and service information and labeling
disclosures.description: Report the total number of incidents of non-compliance with regulations and/or voluntary codes concerning product and service information and labeling.

requiredMetrics.name: Labeling non-compliance incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Number of non-compliance incidents for product labeling

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of incidents of non-compliance with regulations and/or voluntary codes concerning product and service information and labeling.

disclosures.name: Incidents of non-compliance concerning marketing communications
disclosures.description: Report the total number of incidents of non-compliance with regulations and/or voluntary codes concerning marketing communications.

requiredMetrics.name: Marketing non-compliance incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Number of non-compliance incidents for marketing communications

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of incidents of non-compliance with regulations and/or voluntary codes concerning marketing communications, including advertising, promotion, and sponsorship.

disclosures.name: Substantiated complaints concerning breaches of customer privacy and losses of customer data
disclosures.description: Report the total number of substantiated complaints regarding breaches of customer privacy and losses of customer data.

requiredMetrics.name: Privacy complaints
requiredMetrics.description: Number of substantiated complaints about privacy breaches

requiredMetrics.name: Customer data leaks/thefts/losses
requiredMetrics.description: Number of identified leaks, thefts, or losses of customer data

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of substantiated complaints received concerning breaches of customer privacy. Report the total number of identified leaks, thefts, or losses of customer data.

crossReferences.notes: Saudi Exchange KPI S2: Data Privacy
